## Discovery Method

| ------------ | ---------------------------------------- | ----------------------------- |
| CSS features | `doiuse` by browser family               | `last pass before first fail` |
| JS syntax    | `es-check` by ES level                   | `oldest passing ES level`     |
| JS APIs      | `eslint-plugin-compat` by browser family | `last pass before first fail` |
